title: Oil prices soar amid worries of sustained war in Iran
summary_full: The war in the Mideast has effectively halted shipping through the Strait of Hormuz, threatening to push up gas prices and raise the cost of other goods.
summary_public: The war in the Mideast has effectively halted shipping through the Strait of Hormuz, threatening to push up gas prices and raise the cost of other goods.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: war in Iran...halted shipping through the Strait of Hormuz
